introSection: Happy Valley Chengdu is a theme park in Jinniu District, Chengdu, Sichuan Province, China. Opened on 17 January 2009, it is the third installation of the Happy Valley theme park chain.

sections.title: Transportation
sections.content: Happy Valley Chengdu is adjacent to the Xihua Avenue station on Line 6 of Chengdu Metro.

fullText:
Happy Valley Chengdu is a theme park in Jinniu District, Chengdu, Sichuan Province, China. Opened on 17 January 2009, it is the third installation of the Happy Valley theme park chain.



Happy Valley Chengdu is adjacent to the Xihua Avenue station on Line 6 of Chengdu Metro.
